hello: I Bring Your Vision to Life
name: Can Surer
aboutIntro: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of professional experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Proven track record shipping large-scale products — including platforms with up to 20 million active users — in agile teams across international environments.
aboutSpecialization: Experienced with state management (Redux Toolkit, MobX), microfrontend architecture, CI/CD pipelines, REST API integration, and security-critical feature development. Strong attention to detail — I implement pixel-perfect designs from Figma with cross-browser compatibility.
